headline: Moderna’s Diverging Flu Vaccine Rulings May Shift mRNA Growth Story
summary: European Medicines Agency approves Moderna's mRNA flu vaccine with strong efficacy in older adults. US FDA initially declines to review the same vaccine despite positive clinical trial data. Moderna's CEO signals a potential pullback in US based late stage trials after the FDA decision. Political scrutiny of FDA processes and the departure of a key FDA official add uncertainty for US biotech. Regulatory divergence is influencing biotech investment flows toward Europe and other...
